== Notes for [[Item:Q89402|Q89402]] ==

http://gw2.geneanet.org/index.php3?b=jfantoine&lang=fr;pz=jean+francois+pierre+paul;nz=antoine;ocz=0;p=caeionius+julianus+camerius;n=de+rome

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2DEBB4F2EF1EFBBE49822EF79916C0CB3
geni:6000000012888207243

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
